summary: Frontend-only redesign regression testing completed on public URL. Verified header toolbar usability/visibility (desktop + tablet), theme toggle behavior, monthly trend tab switching, sidebar collapse/expand, product vs pipeline section rendering distinction, and horizontal overflow checks. No functional regressions found in tested flows. MOCKED APIs: none.
action_items: Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/src/styles/dashboard-redesign.css (1874 lines) into smaller scoped style modules.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard-redesign.css is oversized (>700 lines) and should be modularized to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://maven-sales-hub.stage-preview.emergentagent.com with Playwright at 1920x1080 and 768x1024. Verified no horizontal overflow and all requested interactions pass. Screenshots captured in /app/test_reports/pytest/.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in this iteration.
